projectDescription: A real-time game map tracking overlay that uses computer vision (SIFT) and deep learning (LoFTR) to automatically locate the player's position on a large game map by matching the in-game minimap.
keyFeatures: Dual-engine tracking: SIFT (CPU-based, fast) and LoFTR AI (GPU-based, robust)
Real-time floating overlay window with always-on-top display
Dual-map separation: pure logic map for matching, annotated display map for rendering
Inertial navigation to maintain position during brief tracking loss
CLAHE contrast enhancement for weak-texture areas (ocean, plains)
Route management system with categories (plants, routes, other) and visit tracking
Mouse click-through mode with F9 hotkey toggle for seamless gameplay
Custom AI model training pipeline with synthetic dataset generation
Map tile download and stitching utility
publicApiSurface: main_ai.py — Launch LoFTR AI tracking mode
config.json — Main configuration file for all tracking parameters
route_manager.RouteManager — Route loading and drawing manager
train.py:train_model() — Train custom heatmap tracker model
download_map.py:download_and_stitch() — Download and stitch map tiles
draw_markers.py — Convert JSON point data to map markers
